top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 33 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
Example reliability: 0% on 4004 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.
Freshness visibility is weak: only 42.58% pages show last updated

analysis.executive_summary: Audit covered 4,004 pages across Tines documentation (100% crawl coverage of discovered scope). Identified 19 confirmed broken internal links within user-facing docs. API reference coverage is 75.76% across 969 detected API pages. Example code reliability shows 0% detection (likely technical limitation due to JS rendering). Only 42.58% of pages display last-updated metadata, and SEO/geo issues affect 18.1% of content.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage (100%) of discovered documentation scope with 4,004 pages indexed
Strong API page detection with 969 pages identified and 75.76% reference coverage
High API detection confidence at 85% and crawl confidence at 95%
Single-product topology provides clear documentation structure
risks: 19 confirmed broken internal links in user-facing documentation degrade user experience and trust
33 unverified links due to authentication, rate-limiting, or server blocks create uncertainty in link health
SEO/geo issue rate of 18.1% may impact discoverability and search ranking
Example code reliability at 0% suggests detection failure; actual code quality unknown and unvalidated
Only 42.58% last-updated coverage prevents users from assessing content freshness and relevance
Overall confidence of 66.12% indicates moderate audit reliability with significant blind spots
Link verification confidence critically low at 31.54%, limiting broken link analysis reliability

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 19 confirmed broken internal documentation links
Investigate and resolve 33 unverified links (authentication/rate-limit issues) to confirm accessibility
Implement last-updated metadata on remaining 57.42% of pages to improve freshness transparency
Audit and remediate SEO/geo issues affecting 18.1% of pages to improve search visibility
Manually validate example code blocks (audit detected 0% due to JS rendering limitation)

limitations: Example code reliability (0%) likely reflects detection failure on JS-rendered content, not actual code quality; manual review required
33 unverified links could not be validated due to authentication requirements, rate limiting, or server blocks; actual status unknown
Overall confidence of 66.12% and link confidence of 31.54% indicate significant portions of documentation could not be fully assessed
External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code functionality, or alignment with actual product behavior
Crawl limited to 4,004 pages; trap URL filtering (3,878 skipped) may have excluded legitimate dynamic or parameterized documentation pages
